gates.required_evidence: v0.4.1/v0.5/v0.7/v0.8/v0.9 manifests and validation reports are PASS and immutable for the release candidate.
gates.blocks_until: 候选源数据版本冻结，且 hash/manifest 记录完整。

gates.required_evidence: All promoted rows have valid human_review_label, reviewer, reviewer_role, reviewed_at, notes, basis, evidence_refs, decision_confidence.
gates.blocks_until: 人工审阅签字留痕完整。

gates.required_evidence: Formalization candidates are approved by Product+ETO+TechLead and have runtime scope explicitly granted.
gates.blocks_until: 二次审批通过，且审批记录不可篡改。

gates.required_evidence: Backend import contract, miniprogram display contract, RAG boundary contract, rollback contract all PASS.
A versioned rollback manifest and previous runtime snapshot are available before any import.
gates.blocks_until: 可回滚版本与演练记录齐全。

gates.required_evidence: Every import/reject/promote/read path writes actor, role, source version, before/after hash and reason.
gates.blocks_until: 审计日志设计和测试通过。

minimum_release_rule: No candidate row may be imported until all gates pass and second approval explicitly grants runtime scope.
